fly.name: Fly.io
fly.description: Agent compute — one Fly Machine per user

webapp.name: Web App
webapp.description: TanStack Start SPA with SSR, file-based routing

elite-chat.name: Elite Chat
elite-chat.description: Real-time chat UI with streaming tokens, charts, browser events

elite-router.name: Elite Router
elite-router.description: Chat send, session management, stream bootstrap

agent-events-router.name: Agent Events Router
agent-events-router.description: Ingest endpoint for relay → durable streams

exchange-router.name: Exchange Router
exchange-router.description: Exchange API key management + sync triggers

db.name: Database
db.description: Drizzle ORM schema: workspaces, users, orgs, chat_runs, credits

workspaces-table.name: workspaces
workspaces-table.description: Fly app name, machine ID, status, config JSON, gateway token

elite-chat-runs.name: elite_chat_runs
elite-chat-runs.description: Run tracking: runId, status, token count, cost

agent-api-keys.name: agent_api_keys
agent-api-keys.description: Encrypted API keys for agent ↔ platform auth

credit-balances.name: credit_balances
credit-balances.description: Per-org credit balance and usage tracking

durable-streams.name: Durable Streams Client
durable-streams.description: Electric SQL durable streams — SSE transport for chat events

sse-transport.name: SSE Transport
sse-transport.description: useEliteStreamTransport hook — connects to Electric SQL SSE endpoint

collections.name: Collections
collections.description: 8 typed collections: messages, messageEvents, browserEvents, toolUse, toolResult, researchActivity, errors, runLifecycle

event-routing.name: Event Routing
event-routing.description: Routes raw durable stream events into typed collections

credit-system.name: Credit System
credit-system.description: Usage metering: classify model tier, deduct credits per run

credit-service.name: Credit Service
credit-service.description: Deduct, check balance, grant monthly renewal

elite.name: Elite Agent System
elite.description: Per-user AI agents — one Fly Machine per user with OpenClaw runtime

gateway.name: OpenClaw Gateway
gateway.description: Full agent runtime: LLM orchestration, tool system, memory, conversation

tool-system.name: Tool System
tool-system.description: Extensible tool calls: browse, search, chart, research

skill-loader.name: Skill Loader
skill-loader.description: Dynamic skill loading from workspace files

openclaw-json.name: openclaw.json
openclaw-json.description: Agent configuration: model, tools, channels, skills

identity-md.name: IDENTITY.md
identity-md.description: Agent name, user context, plan tier

relay.name: Event Relay
relay.description: Node.js script executed on Fly Machine — bridges OpenClaw SSE → platform ingest

sse-consumer.name: SSE Consumer
sse-consumer.description: Connects to OpenClaw gateway SSE stream

event-transformer.name: Event Transformer
event-transformer.description: Parses OpenClaw events → typed durable stream events

http-poster.name: HTTP Poster
http-poster.description: POSTs events to platform /api/agent/events ingest endpoint

heartbeat-emitter.name: Heartbeat Emitter
heartbeat-emitter.description: Periodic heartbeat events for run liveness

browser-tool.name: Browser Tool
browser-tool.description: Browserbase integration — cloud browser sessions, screenshot artifacts

file-system.name: Agent File System
file-system.description: Persistent Fly Volume: workspace/, memory/, skills/

provisioner.name: Provisioner
provisioner.description: Inngest workspace-provisioning function — multi-step durable workflow

claim-pool.name: Claim Pool Machine
claim-pool.description: Claims pre-warmed Fly Machine from pool or creates fresh

generate-keys.name: Generate Keys
generate-keys.description: API keys + gateway auth token, encrypted storage

activate-workspace.name: Activate Workspace
activate-workspace.description: Marks workspace active, seeds config files on machine

identity-sync.name: Identity Sync
identity-sync.description: Writes IDENTITY.md + SOUL.md with user-specific data

wake-schedules.name: Wake Schedules
wake-schedules.description: Creates cron schedules for morning brief, daily pipeline

template-sync.name: Template Sync
template-sync.description: managed-template-sync: distributes skill updates + config patches to all active machines

golden-manifest.name: Golden Manifest
golden-manifest.description: Canonical workspace file set (skills, config, templates)

file-writer.name: File Writer
file-writer.description: writeWorkspaceFiles via Fly Machine exec API

health-monitor.name: Health Monitor
health-monitor.description: Machine status tracking + workspace lifecycle transitions

status-tracker.name: Status Tracker
status-tracker.description: Workspace status enum: provisioning → hatching → active → suspended → degraded → failed

gateway-checker.name: Gateway Checker
gateway-checker.description: waitForGatewayReady — polls /health on the OpenClaw gateway

runtime-revisions.name: Runtime Revisions
runtime-revisions.description: Version tracking for agent runtime (OpenClaw image, config schema)

pool.name: Machine Pool
pool.description: Pre-warmed Fly Machines for fast provisioning (~200ms claim vs ~30s create)

pool-manager.name: Pool Manager
pool-manager.description: Maintains pool of ready machines, handles claims + replenishment

pool-machines-table.name: pool_machines
pool-machines-table.description: DB table: available pre-warmed machine IDs

template-sync-elite.label: Writes files to (via Fly exec API)

elite-router-gateway-proxies-chat-messag.label: Proxies chat messages to (via Fly exec)
